overview: Based on the published agenda, this meeting was scheduled for the Wausau East High School Graduation ceremony on May 30, 2026. While a quorum of the Board of Education may have been present at the graduation, the agenda explicitly noted that no Board action would be taken during this event.

discussions.body: The Board of Education was scheduled to attend the Wausau East High School Graduation ceremony. The agenda noted that while a quorum of Board members may be present at the event, no official Board action was planned to take place during the graduation.

publicComment: No public comment period was included on this agenda.
title: Public Meeting - 2026-05-30
